GeneralDescription.SourceString: From the catwalk to the boardwalk.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: From the catwalk to the boardwalk.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Purradise Meowscles is feline fine! The Island's latest cat-astrophe is basically ancient hiss-tory, and this swole cat is happy to spend some time cat nappin', beach pawtyin', and plain ol' kitten around.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Purradise Meowscles is feline fine! The Island's latest cat-astrophe is basically ancient hiss-tory, and this swole cat is happy to spend some time cat nappin', beach pawtyin', and plain ol' kitten around.
